signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation Rises to 2.2%, Below Forecasts; Fed Freezes Rates Amid Iran-Driven Oil Surge** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence

South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in prior months, missing market expectations of 2.4% and staying near the Bank of Korea's 2% target despite global energy volatility from the Iran conflict.[1] This softer-than-
